cards.front: What is the purpose of the INSERT statement in a database management system?
cards.back: To add new data to a database table.

cards.front: What is the format of a record in a relational database table?
cards.back: A record is a row of data in a table, consisting of columns and values separated by commas.

cards.front: What values can be used to insert a record into a table?
cards.back: Values that match the data types of the columns in the table.

cards.front: What is the INSERT INTO statement used for?
cards.back: To specify the table into which a new record is to be inserted.

cards.front: What is the syntax for inserting a record into a table using an INSERT INTO statement?
cards.back: INSERT INTO table_name (column1, column2, ...) VALUES (value1, value2, ...)
